general.question: What is Exereyes and what is its purpose?
general.answer: Exereyes is an AI-powered personal trainer application developed by Lotus Sport Technology. Our goal is to enable individuals to perform personalized exercises supported by scientific data without the need for expensive equipment.

general.question: What should I do if the camera doesn't detect objects?
general.answer: Ensure the environment is well-lit and your lens is clean. Scanning objects as a whole increases success. If the internet is slow or detection fails, you can add objects manually.

general.question: Where should I place the phone?
general.answer: Place the phone at a right angle on a stable surface. Stand about 1-1.5 meters behind the phone so the camera can see the entire exercise area.

general.question: Can I use my own professional equipment (dumbbells, etc.)?
general.answer: Absolutely! Although designed for household items, you can use professional equipment in place of domestic items if they serve the same purpose.

general.question: Is the application free to use?
general.answer: Yes. In line with the principle of social inclusivity, Exereyes offers its basic features to users free of charge.

general.question: Is there an age limit?
general.answer: The app is designed for individuals aged 15 and over. Users under 18 require the approval of a legal guardian.

general.question: Can I use it on iOS (iPhone)?
general.answer: Exereyes is currently fully optimized for Android. The iOS version will be available on the App Store very soon.

general.question: How can I contact you?
general.answer: You can use the 'Contact' section in the app, email us at info@lotussport.net, or call +90 532 671 1570.

account.question: How do I create my profile and what can I change?
account.answer: You can create a profile by logging in with your phone number and verification code. You can update your Name, Height, Weight, and Age at any time.

account.question: Are my camera images recorded?
account.answer: Images are processed instantly and are not recorded on our servers. They may only be used anonymously to improve AI if you give explicit consent. Data is protected under GDPR standards.

account.question: What happens to my data if I delete my account?
account.answer: Your personal data will be permanently destroyed or anonymized after legal retention periods. This action cannot be undone.

services.question: I don't have sports equipment, how does the app work?
services.answer: Exereyes recognizes objects like chairs, water bottles, or books via your camera and transforms them into virtual sports equipment for your program.

services.question: Does the app consider chronic conditions (Herniated disc, etc.)?
services.answer: Yes. In the 'Health History' screen, you can mark conditions like Scoliosis or Hypertension. The AI will automatically remove risky movements from your program.

services.question: Is there customization for injuries?
services.answer: Absolutely. You can select problematic areas like shoulders or knees in the 'Injuries' tab, and the system will offer alternative exercises.

services.question: Does it work without an internet connection?
services.answer: An active internet connection is required for cloud-based AI analysis. However, some basic profile features can be viewed offline.

services.question: Does it show calorie burn and training history?
services.answer: Yes. The app calculates estimated calorie burn and provides daily, weekly, and monthly statistical history.

accountActions.deactivateDescription: When you deactivate your account, all your data is removed and you will no longer be able to access it. This action cannot be undone.
accountActions.deleteDescription: Deleting your account permanently removes all your data and you won't be able to access it again. This is more permanent than deactivation.

alerts.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all of your data will be permanently removed.

privacyPolicy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacyPolicy.intro: This privacy statement explains how the Lotus Sport website collects and uses data. In order to provide you with better service, when you access this application, we request some personal information from you. This includes information such as name, surname, email address, mobile phone number, etc. This information may be used to improve the site and understand customer trends.
privacyPolicy.dataSharing: Lotus Sport absolutely does not share the information it collects with third parties without your knowledge, does not use it for commercial purposes for any reason outside of its activities, and does not sell it.
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicyTitle: LOTUS SPORT and EXEREYES COOKIE POLICY
privacyPolicy.cookiePolicyIntro: In this cookie policy, we use the term "cookie" to refer to cookies and other similar technologies subject to the EU Directive on electronic communications privacy.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small, usually encrypted text files found on websites. They are used by web developers to help users navigate websites efficiently and perform certain functions. Most web browsers support cookies; however, users can configure their browsers to reject certain types of cookies or delete them at any time.

whatCookiesCannotDo.title: What Can't Cookies Do?
whatCookiesCannotDo.content: Cookies are plain text files; they cannot directly access your computer or personal data. They are only used to enhance website functionality. This ensures that features such as login, language preferences, theme selections, or shopping cart work properly.

howCookiesCollected.title: How Are Cookies Collected?
howCookiesCollected.content: The data used by cookies is collected through the devices you access the browser with. This information is device-specific and can be deleted or restricted by the user when requested.

whyUseCookies.title: Why Do We Use Cookies in Our Application?
whyUseCookies.content: We use cookies in our application to enhance your user experience, analyze your interactions, and improve your visit experience. For example, it facilitates your transactions by remembering your preferred language, username, or shopping cart. Additionally, some cookies may analyze your behavior to show you personalized advertisements.

cookieTypes.title: What Types of Cookies Do We Use in Our Application?
cookieTypes.content: Session Cookies: These are temporary cookies that are deleted when you close your browser. Persistent Cookies: These are stored in your browser's subfolders for a certain period of time or until manually deleted.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.content: You can contact us at info@lotussport.net to share all your questions and opinions regarding the Cookie Policy.

congratulations.congratsContent: You've completed your training. You can continue and improve your ranking even further.
